decisions.rationale: Observation's base_record_id route_b44-sbs already exists in the registry (display_name: 'Nostrand Avenue-Rogers Avenue Select Bus Service (B44)'). The source 201110_nostrand_cb17_slides is already in its source_ids and alias route_b44-sbs-201110-cb17 is listed. do_not_merge confirms route_b44-sbs is distinct from route_b44-local and route_b44-limited. No different registry record represents the same real-world B44 SBS variant.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Currently served by B44 bus route
Southbound B44 SBS on Nostrand Ave • Northbound B44 SBS on Rogers Ave, B44 local remains on New York Ave

proposed_relations.description: B44 SBS and B44 Local are distinct service variants sharing the B44 base route corridor; source explicitly distinguishes their street alignments.
